title: VINTRACK Causality Policy
description: Governance protocol for event causality tracking, invariant validation, and deterministic replay.
purpose: Ensure all governance events carry correct causality metadata, sequences are monotonic, and replay boundaries are trustworthy.

rules.action: assign global_sequence before appending to stream
rules.description: Every governance event MUST receive a global_sequence at emission time. Enforced by emit-governance-event.ts.

rules.condition: event emitted within an execution context
rules.description: execution_sequence MUST be monotonic within each execution context. Enforced by sequence-tracker.ts.

rules.action: validate parent exists in streams or causality store
rules.description: parent_event_id MUST reference an event that exists in streams or causality store. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-002).
Causality chains MUST be acyclic and MUST NOT contain self-references. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-003).
Cross-execution linkages MUST declare a valid linkage_type in metadata. Enforced by emit-governance-event.ts + validate-causality.ts (CI-004).

rules.action: reconstruct causality chain from global_sequence order
rules.description: Causality chains MUST be reconstructible from canonical global_sequence order. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-005).

rules.action: anchor global_sequence and execution_sequence in checkpoint
rules.description: Post-causality checkpoints MUST anchor global_sequence and execution_sequence. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-006).
Once emitted, an event's causality metadata MUST never change. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-007).

rules.condition: multiple children share the same parent_event_id
rules.description: Fork events (multiple children with same parent) MUST emit a lineage.fork event. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-008).

rules.action: reject invalid type orderings (e.g., completed before started)
rules.description: Invalid event type orderings (e.g., completed before started) MUST be rejected. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-009).
Sequence gaps larger than 100 indicate potentially unsafe compression. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-010).

rules.action: assert exactly one causality.boundary event exists
rules.description: Exactly one causality.boundary event MUST exist to declare the replay trust frontier. Enforced by validate-causality.ts + validate-replay-integrity.ts.

rules.action: assert null parent_event_id and empty causality_chain
rules.description: The genesis boundary MUST have null parent_event_id and empty causality_chain. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-002, CI-003).
Legacy ancestors referenced in boundary metadata MUST be classified as pre-normalization lineage. Enforced by validate-replay-integrity.ts (RI-001).

rules.action: stop at genesis boundary or enter legacy replay mode
rules.description: Replay reconstruction MUST stop at the genesis boundary or explicitly enter legacy replay mode. Enforced by validate-replay-integrity.ts (RI-006).
No historical event MAY be mutated during boundary normalization. Enforced by validate-causality.ts (CI-007) + audit-runtime.ts.

invariants.description: Global sequence must be strictly monotonic.

invariants.expression: ∀e_i, e_j within same execution: i < j → execution_sequence(e_i) < execution_sequence(e_j)
invariants.description: Execution sequence must be strictly monotonic within each execution context.
Causality chains must not contain self-references or cycles.

invariants.expression: parent_event_id ≠ null → ∃p in streams: p.event_id = parent_event_id
invariants.description: Parent events must exist in streams or causality store.
Exactly one causality boundary must exist.

global_sequence.description: Monotonically increasing counter across ALL events in the governance runtime.

execution_sequence.description: Monotonically increasing counter within a single execution context.

parent_event_id.description: The immediately preceding event in the causal chain. Null for genesis events.

causality_chain.description: Ordered list of all ancestor event IDs from genesis to parent.
